studentProfile.title: Student Profile
studentProfile.description: Information about the logged-in student, their class grade, and subject preferences

userId.description: Unique user ID matching the authenticated Firebase user

grade.description: Active grade category of the student

board.description: Selectable educational board (e.g. CBSE, ICSE, State Board)

mediumOfLearning.description: Preferred language for interaction (e.g. English, Hindi, Hinglish)

classSession.title: Classroom Session
classSession.description: An interactive classroom session with blackboard state, active syllabus document, and session metadata

sessionId.description: Unique session ID generated on startup

activeDocumentName.description: Name of the active syllabus document, if any

customBoardContent.description: Current blackboard chalk and neon diagram state

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the session was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last session state modification

dialogueMessage.title: Dialogue Message
dialogueMessage.description: A transcripts of verbal communication exchanged during the session between the student and Cherry Ma'am

messageId.description: Unique identifier of the transcription message block

sessionId.description: Session ID this message belongs to

text.description: Verbal transcript sentence or response block

boardSnapshot.title: Board Snapshot
boardSnapshot.description: Whiteboard image snapshots with custom topic titles and descriptions saved to student profiles.

snapshotId.description: Unique snapshot ID generated on creation

topicTitle.description: Title of the board topic discussed

description.description: Short description of the topic discussed

imgData.description: Compressed Base64 JPEG data representing the blackboard snapshot

timestamp.description: Time when the snapshot was stored

/studentProfiles/{userId}.description: Stores user-specific settings matching their UID

/studentProfiles/{userId}/boardSnapshots.description: Whiteboard image snapshots and descriptions saved under specific student profiles

/classSessions/{sessionId}/dialogueMessa.description: Subcollection holding full historical chat/vocal transcript dialogue histories
